mechanism: Channel decomposition shows rate cuts and QT are complementary, not contradictory. Rate cuts support the income channel (debt service relief) while QT's term premium effect persists through the portfolio channel (duration supply). The term premium effect is not offset by rate cuts — they operate on different margins.
regime_dependence: Active during simultaneous rate cuts and QT — current and prospective regime. No historical analog for this combination exists, making empirical validation impossible. Channel dominance may vary by asset class.
